Prof. Niu Lizhi Xu Jiongyuan Hu Yong Liu Zhengping Anup Aboti Michael Litvinov Shi Juanjuan Wang Feng Long Xing’an Xing Yanli Liu Shupeng Phoong Sik Lin Liu Yang Cheng Jiangpeng Li Hongmei Dr. Akash Aboti Previous Next OUR ACHIEVEMENTS Achievements of FUDA CANCER HOSPITAL 50+ Doctors Professional Experts 1200+ Patients Happy Indian Patients 100+ Countries Global Presence 500+ Employees Dedicated Workforce Cancer Treatment Overview Our Expertise Let's Explore Cancer Treatment in Mumbai Cancer Treatment – An Overview Cancer Treatment encompasses various medical therapies aimed at curing, managing, or alleviating the symptoms of cancer. The approach depends heavily on the specific type, stage, and location of the cancer, as well as the patient's overall health and personal preferences. In this process, specialized oncology teams work together to create a personalized plan, utilizing advanced medicine and technology to target abnormal cell growth. Treatment is recommended to achieve remission, prevent the cancer from spreading to other parts of the body, or relieve symptoms to improve quality of life. It often involves a combination of therapies such as surgery, chemotherapy, radiation therapy, immunotherapy, and targeted drug therapy. When Cancer Treatment May Be Recommended Oncologists will develop and suggest a treatment plan in the following situations: Presence of localized or malignant tumors Recurrent cancer that has returned after initial treatment Metastatic cancer that has spread to other parts of the body To shrink a tumor before primary surgery (neoadjuvant therapy) To destroy remaining cancer cells after surgery (adjuvant therapy) Management of symptoms and pain (palliative care) Preventive measures for individuals with high-risk genetic mutations Steps Involved in Cancer Care The oncology journey generally includes the following stages: Step 1: Comprehensive Diagnosis & Staging Physical examination and medical history review Imaging tests (MRI, CT, PET scans, X-rays) Laboratory tests (Blood tests, tumor marker checks) Biopsy to confirm the presence of cancer cells Genomic testing of the tumor Step 2: Primary Intervention (Surgery / Local Therapy) Surgical removal of the tumor and surrounding margins. Lymph node biopsies if necessary. Step 3: Systemic or Radiation Therapies Radiation: High doses of radiation to kill cancer cells. Chemotherapy: Drugs used to destroy rapidly dividing cells. Immunotherapy: Boosting the body's immune system to fight cancer. Step 4: Monitoring and Follow-Up Regular scans and tests to monitor treatment effectiveness. Managing side effects and adjusting dosages. Post-Treatment Care After completing primary cancer treatment, patients are generally advised to: Follow a highly nutritious, balanced diet Avoid smoking, alcohol, and processed foods Attend all scheduled follow-up appointments and scans Take prescribed medications regularly Rest adequately and avoid severe physical strain Manage physical and emotional stress through rehabilitation Factors Affecting Treatment Success Success rates and prognosis depend on several vital factors, including: The specific type and grade of the cancer The stage of the cancer at the time of diagnosis The patient's age and overall physical health How the cancer responds to chosen therapies Genetic mutations present in the cancer cells Emotional and Psychological Support Navigating cancer can be emotionally challenging. Counseling, psycho-oncology support, and support groups can help individuals and families manage stress, cope with uncertainty, and maintain mental resilience during treatment. Emotional well-being plays an integral role in the healing process. Comprehensive Cancer Care We are with you at every step of your healing journey. Hope and advanced medicine in Mumbai, together. Multidisciplinary Tumor Board World-Class Oncologists in Mumbai Advanced Treatment Technology Personalized Care Plans 24/7 Nursing Support Consult Our Experts Today Need immediate assistance? +91 8850860970 Advanced Cancer Treatment Options for Patients in Mumbai Modern, minimally invasive cancer treatments designed to control cancer effectively while ensuring greater comfort and better quality of life. Modern & Minimally Invasive Cancer Treatment Techniques NanoKnife (Irreversible Electroporation): A precise technology that destroys cancer cells using controlled electrical energy while protecting nearby vital structures. Cryo-ablation Therapy: Uses extreme cold to freeze and eliminate tumour cells with minimal damage to healthy tissues. Targeted Vascular Interventional Therapy: Controls tumour growth by reducing or blocking its blood supply. Percutaneous Chemo-Ablation: Directly delivers chemotherapy into the tumour for focused and effective treatment. Integrated Immunotherapy: Helps boost the body’s immune power to fight cancer cells naturally. Brachytherapy: Internal radiation therapy placed close to the tumour for precise radiation delivery. Photodynamic Therapy: Uses light-activated medicines to selectively attack and destroy cancer cells. “3C+P” Comprehensive Treatment Model: A personalised combination of cryotherapy, chemotherapy, immunotherapy and precision care planning. HepaSphere Therapy: Drug-loaded microspheres mainly used in liver cancer to block the tumour’s blood supply. Microwave Tumour Ablation: Uses microwave energy to heat and safely destroy tumour tissues. Microwave Hyperthermia: Localised heating that weakens cancer cells and enhances treatment effectiveness. Supportive Ozone Therapy: Helps improve oxygen circulation and supports overall wellness during treatment. Cancer Types Managed Through These Advanced Treatments Liver Cancer Lung Cancer Pancreatic Cancer Oral Cancer Head & Neck Cancer Kidney Cancer Testicular Cancer Prostate Cancer Ovarian Cancer Cervical Cancer Breast Cancer Esophageal Cancer Stomach Cancer Colon Cancer Soft Tissue & Bone Sarcoma Why These Treatments Are Valuable for Patients in Mumbai These advanced treatment options are especially beneficial for patients in Mumbai who need non-surgical or minimally invasive cancer solutions ,
particularly when major surgery is not suitable or not preferred. The focus of these therapies is to accurately target cancer cells while protecting healthy tissues.
This approach helps in achieving less pain, quicker recovery, fewer side-effects and improved daily comfort .
Based on the patient’s condition, multiple treatments can also be combined for personalised care. These modern techniques are extremely helpful for patients with advanced cancers, recurrent cancer,
elderly patients, and those seeking effective cancer control without major surgery.
Many patients in Mumbai choose these advanced methods while being treated at the Best Cancer Treatment Centre in Mumbai .
